race.description: Southern Suburbs Junior Rugby League Handicap (Bm58)
race.comment: SAMURAI WARRIOR (1) loves it here on his home circuit only missing a drum once in seven outings and winning hoop Geran sticks in the saddle following a dominant last-start victory. Can go right on with the job now. Stablemate JAMCART (5) shed the maiden tag over this course and distance last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that win. Looms as the main danger. DREAM THINKER (3) improved sharply to salute here at the latest effort and must be respected out of the Gollan yard. Has to be included in calculations. VANCITY (2) didn't measure up in town last start but will find this assignment much more to her liking. Can bounce right back. PROCLAIMER (6) is usually thereabouts and is one for the multiples.
